choices.text: Only radiation (IR to space) + conduction (internal between components). No convection (no atmosphere). MLI blankets insulate; radiators reject heat; heaters protect cold-sensitive parts. Sun-pointing spacecraft simpler thermal design.

JWST: passive radiators + sunshade to 50K; MIRI cryocooler to 7K. Earth-orbiting: heaters with thermostats (10-30% power budget). Survive worst-case eclipse + warm-up cycles. CTE mismatch fatigues solder joints over thousands of cycles.
